## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Truelook and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Truelook seeks improved SEO/AI search presence; current agency underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy, creation, and publishing (1-2 posts/wk → \~10/wk)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K strategy sprint + $12K/mo for 12 months (flexible payments)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send SOW, schedule follow-up with CEO + Truelook team](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

## Topics

### Truelook's Current Situation

  - [Recently launched AI-powered PPE detection feature](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Working with SEO/SEM agency, unhappy with SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Creating 1-2 blog posts per week](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Seeking stronger presence in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Current agency contract ended; now month-to-month](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end content partner: strategy → creation → publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for scale (10+ pieces/week) without sacrificing quality](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint + 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Team: Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Expertise from leaders who've built successful content engines (e.g., Fanatics, TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Deep research on business, competitors, personas](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [AI workflows for brief creation, research, outlining, drafting, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Human experts in the loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Publish directly to client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Options for client involvement in review process](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Pricing Structure

  - [Strategy sprint: $20,000 for Truelook (lower end of $20K-$40K range)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [12-month growth execution: $12,000/month (discounted from $15K)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Flexible payment options (semi-annual or quarterly)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### Differentiation from Traditional Agencies

  - [Scale of content production (1-2/week → 10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for efficiency and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Deep expertise in AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Potential to reduce paid ad spend through improved organic presence](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send sample Statement of Work (SOW) to Truelook](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with GrowthX CEO Marcel and expanded Truelook team](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide relevant case studies (construction industry if possible)](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Truelook to review SOW and prepare questions for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ySYSrpbuvohJsxoTdybpVJHZK_qHEzra?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
